name: Stage 2 — Identity & Access Management
description: ATT&CK technique coverage for Pipeline Stage 2: Identity & Access Management. Vendors: Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, CyberArk, BeyondTrust, Ping Identity, Zscaler. NIST controls: IA-2, IA-5, AC-2, AC-3, AC-6, IA-4. Source: TeamStarWolf Security Pipeline https://github.com/TeamStarWolf/TeamStarWolf/blob/main/SECURITY_PIPELINE.md

techniques.comment: Stage 2 IAM — Entra ID + Okta: MFA, Conditional Access, identity risk scoring
Stage 2 IAM — Domain account protection via privileged identity management
Stage 2 PAM — CyberArk: local account vaulting and rotation
Stage 2 CIEM — Wiz/Entra: cloud account entitlement management
Stage 2 IAM — Entra ID + Okta: smart lockout, MFA, and password protection block brute force
Stage 2 IAM — Password guessing blocked by lockout + MFA
Stage 2 IAM — Password spraying detection
Stage 2 IAM — Credential stuffing blocked by MFA
Stage 2 IAM — Entra ID Conditional Access: authentication process modification detection
Stage 2 IAM — MFA modification detection
Stage 2 IAM — Entra ID + Okta: MFA push bombing detection, number matching
Stage 2 IAM — Account manipulation detection and alerting
Stage 2 IAM — Additional cloud credential detection
Stage 2 IAM — Cloud role assignment detection
Stage 2 IAM — Unauthorized account creation detection
Stage 2 PAM — CyberArk: credential dumping prevention via privileged session isolation
Stage 2 PAM — CyberArk: least privilege limits privilege escalation exploitation
Stage 2 PAM — CyberArk: Pass-the-Hash prevention
Stage 2 PAM — CyberArk: Kerberoasting mitigation via managed service account rotation
Stage 2 PAM — Kerberoasting: managed SPN password rotation
